Schools Closed News: Several states including Delhi, Uttar Pradesh, Rajasthan and Telangana announced summer holidays for schools in 2026 as rising temperatures and heatwave conditions affected students across India. Scroll down to check state-wise list.
Schools Closed News: Several states including Delhi, Uttar Pradesh, Rajasthan and Telangana announced summer holidays for schools in 2026 as rising temperatures and heatwave conditions affected students across India. Scroll down to check state-wise list.
Summer Holidays 2026 Announced Across States
Several Indian states have announced summer vacation schedules for schools as temperatures continue to rise across the country. Holiday dates vary from state to state depending on local weather conditions and academic calendars. Here is a state-wise look at the summer holiday schedule for 2026.
Delhi Announces 50-Day Summer Break
Keeping the severe heatwave in mind, the Delhi Education Department has announced summer vacations from May 11 to June 30, 2026. Schools will reopen on July 1. The decision was taken due to rising temperatures, hot winds and humidity affecting children’s health and studies.
Uttar Pradesh
In Uttar Pradesh, government schools will remain closed from May 20 to June 15. Some private schools may start vacations earlier depending on heat conditions.
Rajasthan
Rajasthan schools will be closed from May 17 to June 20, 2026. Due to extreme heat, school timings had already been adjusted in several districts.
Bihar and Haryana
In Bihar, summer vacations are scheduled from June 1 to June 20. Haryana is also expected to follow a similar pattern, with holidays likely from June 1 to June 30.
Jharkhand, MP and Chhattisgarh
States like Jharkhand, Madhya Pradesh, and Chhattisgarh have also seen temperature fluctuations. Vacation schedules are expected around mid-May, though final dates may vary by district.
West Bengal
West Bengal has already started summer vacations in most districts due to heat, except hill regions like Darjeeling and Kalimpong where weather remains cooler.
Punjab
Punjab schools are expected to follow a phased summer vacation schedule during May and June, depending on local weather conditions.
Telangana Summer Holidays
Schools across Telangana are observing summer holidays from April 24 to June 11, 2026. Students are expected to return to classes after the vacation period ends.
Andhra Pradesh Summer Holidays
Schools in Andhra Pradesh are observing summer vacations from April 24 to June 11, 2026. Authorities announced the schedule earlier this year.
Important Note for Students
Summer vacation dates may vary for private and government schools. Students are advised to stay in touch with their schools for exact schedules, as changes can happen based on weather conditions.
